description: Payment processing module: card validation (Luhn algorithm), card type detection, card data encryption, and payment gateway integration

functions.name: detectCardType
functions.purpose: Detect credit card type (visa/mastercard/amex) by regex pattern matching

functions.name: validateCard
functions.purpose: Validate card number format and Luhn checksum
security: implements Luhn algorithm for card validation

functions.name: encryptCardData
functions.purpose: Encrypt card number and CVV using base64 encoding (not real encryption)
security: uses btoa (not real encryption) - card data weakly protected

functions.name: processPayment
functions.purpose: Full payment flow: validate card → encrypt data → send to payment gateway
security: sends card data to external API

dataFlow: cardNumber + cvv → validateCard (Luhn check + type detection) → encryptCardData (btoa encoding)
amount + currency + encrypted card → JSON payload → POST /v1/charge → transaction ID

securityIssues.issue: Card data encrypted with btoa (base64, not real encryption)
Full card number and CVV processed in plaintext memory
Card data sent to external payment gateway over HTTPS
No input validation for amount/currency - potential injection
